title: LoL optimization
description: Play Minecraft with fun and with almost no lag!
body:
тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАОтАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО [Discord]([https://discord.gg/f5DTxUCuwC](https://discord.gg/6kfrcvhdg2)) тАв [The mods](https://docs.google.com/document/d/19_dtfo7rDZjf0ZYUCGAQ1urURdUnxpUhnVlHuyGCqPs/edit?usp=sharing) тАв [LoL inc](https://modrinth.com/organization/lol-inc) ![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47067f1166334e69a98327f069e18c0ab5eb34c3_0.webp) LoL Optimization is a **performance-focused Fabric modpack for Minecraft 1.21.1**, designed to boost FPS, reduce lag, and improve overall gameplay smoothness without sacrificing vanilla mechanics. This modpack includes: тЬЕ FPS Enhancements тАУ Optimized rendering, better chunk loading, and reduced stuttering. тЬЕ Low Latency Tweaks тАУ Faster networking and improved server responsiveness. тЬЕ Memory & CPU Optimization тАУ Smarter resource allocation for a smoother experience. тЬЕ UI & QoL Improvements тАУ Sleek performance overlays and better debugging tools.
FAQ **Will this modpack work on low-end PCs?** Yes! LoL Opti is designed to make Minecraft run smoother on both high-end and low-end machines. **Does this modpack change gameplay or add new features?** No, this modpack keeps the vanilla Minecraft experience intact while improving performance. **Is this compatible with shaders and resource packs?** Yes! You can add shaders and resource packs, but performance may vary based on your hardware. **Can I use this modpack on a multiplayer server?** Yes! Many optimizations help both single-player and multiplayer performance. However, server-side optimizations may require additional mods on the server. **Does this work with other mods?** LoL Opti is designed for maximum compatibility, but if you add many mods, performance might be affected.
